name_cn:
Top-tier replica with full packaging
❤️❤️Lady Dior Three-Compartment Embroidery Full Rhinestone, meticulously crafted from satin material. The full rhinestone pattern is created with extensive beaded embroidery, showcasing Dior's exquisite craftsmanship. Adorned with light gold-finished metal 'D.I.O.R.' charm, accented with white faux crystals, adding a touch of liveliness to the exquisite silhouette. Mini style, with detachable chain strap, can be carried by hand or crossbody, an ideal companion for evening wear. Detachable chain strap, can be paired with other embroidered straps at will. Dimensions: 17×15×7cm
